review: the buggiest most garbage fastfood app ive ever used
takes forever to load. let's see Android auto support, that would be game changing!
constantly being logged out for no reason and now being given "invalid codes" multiple times in a row when I'm trying to use my rewards really tanks any usefulness this app had
Opening the app after a long period of time only to see half my points expired is a demoralizing and negative experience.
